ch01_01.title: First Contact
ch01_01.description: Make the security terminal display the message 'Hello, World!' using the print() function.

ch01_02.title: Cover Identity
ch01_02.description: Create a variable called 'codename' and assign it your operative name as a string. Then print it.

ch01_03.title: Cracking Numbers
ch01_03.description: The security lock code is the result of a calculation. Compute and print the answer using Python math operators.

ch01_04.title: Data Recon
ch01_04.description: Use the type() function to identify the data types of a string variable and an integer variable.

ch01_05.title: Thermal Override
ch01_05.description: Convert the server room temperature from Celsius to Fahrenheit using the conversion formula.

ch01_06.title: Name Assembly
ch01_06.description: Combine a first name and last name into a full name using string concatenation.

ch01_07.title: Terminal Art
ch01_07.description: Print a simple ASCII art snake on the terminal using multiple print statements.

ch01_08.title: Code Notes
ch01_08.description: Add comments to explain what each line of code does. Comments help other operatives understand your work.

ch02_01.title: Case Shift
ch02_01.description: Transform a codename using .upper(), .lower(), and .title() string methods.

ch02_02.title: Code Extraction
ch02_02.description: Extract specific characters from an access code using string indexing.

ch02_03.title: Message Intercept
ch02_03.description: Slice an intercepted message to extract different parts using string slicing notation.

ch02_04.title: ID Forge
ch02_04.description: Create a formatted ID card using f-strings to embed variables directly in text.

ch02_05.title: Codename Entry
ch02_05.description: Use the input() function to read the operative's codename and display a personalized greeting.

ch02_06.title: Code Converter
ch02_06.description: Read a door code as text input and convert it to a number to perform calculations.

ch02_07.title: Status Report
ch02_07.description: Build a complex mission status report using f-strings with multiple variables.

ch02_08.title: Password Audit
ch02_08.description: Check a password's length using len() and determine if it meets minimum requirements.

ch03_01.title: Access Check
ch03_01.description: Use an if statement to check if an access code matches the secret code.

ch03_02.title: Door Protocol
ch03_02.description: Use if/else to check a door's locked status and print the appropriate message.

ch03_03.title: Level Assessment
ch03_03.description: Compare two clearance levels using comparison operators and print the boolean results.

ch03_04.title: Threat Classifier
ch03_04.description: Classify a threat score into categories using an if/elif/else chain.

ch03_05.title: Security Gate
ch03_05.description: Combine multiple security conditions using and, or, and not logical operators.

ch03_06.title: Two-Factor Auth
ch03_06.description: Implement a two-factor authentication check using nested if statements.

ch03_07.title: Alarm Logic
ch03_07.description: Use boolean variables and logical operators to determine alarm system status.

ch03_08.title: Password Validator
ch03_08.description: Write a password validator that checks length, digit, and letter requirements using complex conditions.

ch04_01.title: Guard Roster
ch04_01.description: Use a for loop to print each guard's name from a patrol list.

ch04_02.title: Camera Setup
ch04_02.description: Use range() in a for loop to label security cameras numbered 0 through 4.

ch04_03.title: Patrol Schedule
ch04_03.description: Use range(start, stop) to print the guard rotation schedule for specific hours.

ch04_04.title: Launch Countdown
ch04_04.description: Use a while loop to count down from 5 to 1, then print LAUNCH!

ch04_05.title: Password Loop
ch04_05.description: Keep prompting for a password using a while loop until the correct one is entered.

ch04_06.title: Target Search
ch04_06.description: Search a list for a target and use break to stop when found.

ch04_07.title: Camera Filter
ch04_07.description: Skip disabled cameras using continue while printing all active ones.

ch04_08.title: Grid Scan
ch04_08.description: Generate all grid coordinates using nested for loops over rows and columns.

ch04_09.title: Badge Tally
ch04_09.description: Sum all badge numbers using the accumulator pattern with a for loop.

ch04_10.title: Entry Points
ch04_10.description: Number each access point using enumerate() with a starting index of 1.

ch05_01.title: Greeting Protocol
ch05_01.description: Define a function that takes a name parameter and returns a greeting message.

ch05_02.title: Access Calculator
ch05_02.description: Create a function that calculates an access level by multiplying clearance and rank.

ch05_03.title: ID Card Printer
ch05_03.description: Write a function with three parameters to format an operative's ID card.

ch05_04.title: Alert System
ch05_04.description: Create an alert function with a default severity level parameter.

ch05_05.title: Coordinate Decoder
ch05_05.description: Write a function that decodes encoded coordinates and returns multiple values.

ch05_06.title: Verification Chain
ch05_06.description: Build a multi-step verification system where functions call other functions.

ch05_07.title: Scope Mission
ch05_07.description: Understand local vs global variable scope by calling a function that uses local variables.

ch05_08.title: Activity Logger
ch05_08.description: Create a function that accepts any number of arguments using *args.

ch05_09.title: Terminal Config
ch05_09.description: Create a function that accepts keyword arguments using **kwargs to configure a terminal.

ch05_10.title: Guard Sorter
ch05_10.description: Sort a list of guards by their level using a lambda function as the sort key.

ch06_01.title: Tool Inventory
ch06_01.description: Create a list of hacking tools and access each item by its index.

ch06_02.title: Inventory Update
ch06_02.description: Use .append() and .remove() to modify a list of tools.

ch06_03.title: Message Archive
ch06_03.description: Use list slicing to extract recent messages and first messages from a log.

ch06_04.title: Camera Filter Pro
ch06_04.description: Use a list comprehension to filter active camera IDs from a list of dictionaries.

ch06_05.title: Coordinate Pairs
ch06_05.description: Store location coordinates as tuples and unpack them into separate variables.

ch06_06.title: Employee File
ch06_06.description: Create a dictionary to store employee profile data and access values by key.

ch06_07.title: Profile Editor
ch06_07.description: Add new keys and update existing values in a dictionary using dict methods.

ch06_08.title: Floor Plan
ch06_08.description: Navigate nested dictionaries to access deeply stored floor plan data.

ch06_09.title: Badge Scanner
ch06_09.description: Use sets and their union/intersection methods to analyze badge scan data.

ch06_10.title: Intel Merge
ch06_10.description: Merge two dictionaries using spread syntax and iterate over sorted results.
